train_config.notes: Calibrated SAC with widened 256x256 network and sac_num_epochs=2 for DC Microgrid. total_timesteps aligned to the 1M stable Phase-1 regime chosen after PPO long-horizon instability and task re-calibration. eval_freq and wall-time logging remain aligned with train_ppo.yaml for comparable curves.

hypothesis_test.name: paired_episode_signflip_permutation
hypothesis_test.pairing: same seed + episode index on primary split

task_config.notes: Frozen task definition for DC Microgrid benchmark (288x5min, Google workload, GB real solar generation trace normalized to PV capacity factor, GB MID market grid-import price trace, deterministic outdoor-temperature adapter, multi-objective robust RL). Main table uses 4 splits (eval_splits = eval_splits_main, P0-B canonical alias); all 6 OOD scenarios reported in appendix (eval_splits_appendix). Reward shaping converts the underlying CMDP to a plain MDP so vanilla PPO/SAC can learn constraint-aware policies. Current case calibration uses dg_p_max_mw=1.2, pv_p_max_mw=0.8, grid_import_p_max_mw=1.5, battery_soc_window=[0.15,0.90], terminal_soc_target=0.55, terminal_soc_penalty=20000, w_cost=0.2, w_carbon=0.1. Reward shaping uses lambda_deficit=200, lambda_spill=100, lambda_dispatch_tracking=40 with price-aware battery/DG dispatch targets. DG is benchmark-wrapped as a same-step load-following slack actuator because the DC sub-step realises load after workload/cooling actions; direct same-step DG setpoints otherwise create avoidable residual imbalance unrelated to the intended control tradeoff. Submission-grade protocol uses 5 seeds and a paired episode-level sign-flip permutation test on the primary split. convergence_threshold_per_split / convergence_provenance / safety_thresholds populated by P0-E experiment_ops.py derive_target after the seed-0 pipeline.
